title: Wire SearchMemory results or strip dead calls
description:
## Problem
SearchMemory is called ~15 times per gather cycle from HtnTaskLibrary.cs with hardcoded queries. Results are stored in planContext but NEVER consumed by any downstream action — 99% confidence from 2 audits. TSK-0004 (SearchMemory → MoveTo context injection) was planned in Phase 4 but never implemented.

## Fix Options
Option A: Implement TSK-0004 — wire SearchMemory results (coordinates, page ID) into MoveTo arguments
Option B: Strip SearchMemory calls from gather/build decompositions — adapter's bot.findBlock() already does spatial search locally

## Acceptance Criteria
- Either TSK-0004 implemented OR SearchMemory removed from decompositions
- No redundant SearchMemory calls per replan cycle

## Priority: P0
## Labels: correctness, sprint-44, performance
